news.t: The First Trust Technology AlphaDEX Fund ETF's Underlying Holdings Could Mean 12% Gain Potential
The First Trust Technology AlphaDEX Fund ETF's Holdings Imply 10% Gain Potential

holdings.infoBox: FXL is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.95%, Marvell Technology at 3.83%, Dell Technologies at 3.06%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.51%, and Lam Research at 2.23%.

overview.description: The First Trust Technology AlphaDEX Fund (FXL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the StrataQuant Technology index. The fund tracks a tiered, equal-weighted index of large- and mid-cap US technology firms. Holdings are selected and weighted based on growth and value metrics. FXL was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: The First Trust Technology AlphaDEX Fund ETF's Underlying Holdings Could Mean 12% Gain Potential
data.text: For the First Trust Technology AlphaDEX Fund ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $70.75 per unit.
